allow: Bash(grep -l "#[0-9a-fA-F]\\{3,6\\}" src/components/SearchModal.tsx src/components/NodeDetailPanel.tsx src/components/ImportModal.tsx src/components/OrgPanel.tsx src/components/PromptTemplateManager.tsx src/components/SpaceSwitcher.tsx src/components/NodeVersionHistory.tsx src/components/NodeExplorer.tsx src/components/AuditLogViewer.tsx src/components/SubscriptionPanel.tsx src/components/AiTriggerButton.tsx)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\work\\local\\Ripple\\backend-go" -Recurse -Filter "go.mod" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\tools" -Recurse -Filter "go.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Program Files" -Recurse -Filter "go.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "${env:USERPROFILE}\\scoop" -Recurse -Filter "go.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName)
